Here’s what you need to know. - The Athletic","content":"The show is curated by Coldplay’s Chris Martin, and includes a line-up of international mega stars — including Justin Bieber, who was recently added, Shakira, Burna Boy, BTS, Madonna and Venezuelan conductor Gustavo Dudamel.

The halftime show at the Club World Cup last summer took place in the stands.
Conmebol organized its first-ever halftime show for the final of the Copa America at Hard Rock Stadium in Miami Gardens, with Shakira as the headliner.
For that year’s Copa America final, played between Argentina and Colombia, players were waiting about 26 minutes before the second half was under way.
As this is the largest World Cup ever, and with the final hosted in the United States, it also offers a unique opportunity for FIFA to venture further into sports entertainment, which is such a big part of U.S. sports culture."},{"url":"https://www.globalcitizen.org/en/events-broadcasts/fifa-world-cup-final-half-time-show/","title":"FIFA World Cup™ 2026 Final Half-Time Show: A Half-Time Show Like No Other","content":"2 hours ago — On July 19, Madonna, Shakira + Burna Boy, BTS, Justin Bieber, Gustavo Dudamel, and the PS 22 Chorus featuring Coldplay will perform at the first-ever FIFA World ...Read more

But the World Cup is about more than just football, it’s a moment to unite the world.

For the first time in FIFA World Cup™ history, the final will feature a Halftime Show, bringing together superstars for a singular moment at the intersection of sport, culture, and purpose, broadcast live around the world. The Halftime Show will support the FIFA Global Citizen Education Fund, a landmark initiative working to raise USD $100 million to expand access to quality education and football for children worldwide. Together with some of your favorite characters, this all-star lineup will light up the FIFA World Cup 2026™ Final as part of a historic show curated by Coldplay’s Chris Martin, all in support of the FIFA Global Citizen Education Fund.","score":0.92176014,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.eonline.com/news/1433791/world-cup-2026-halftime-show-details-bts-justin-bieber-to-perform","title":"World Cup 2026 Halftime Show Details: BTS, Justin Bieber to Perform","content":"# Inside World Cup 2026's First-Ever Halftime Show With Justin Bieber, BTS and More. The 2026 World Cup will end with a bang as BTS, Shakira, Madonna and Justin Bieber take the stage for the championship match at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey July 19. As the international soccer competition makes its way through stadiums across North America, the championship match will kick off at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey July 19, featuring a well-known sports tradition in the US: a dazzling halftime performance. Indeed, **BTS**, **Shakira**, **Madonna** and**Justin Bieber** are joining forces to co-headline the first-ever FIFA World Cup Halftime Show, curated by **Coldplay** frontman **Chris Martin**. Bieber, who was added to the lineup on July 8, is thrilled to be bringing \"the world together\" with the massive production. The *Real Housewives of Rhode Island* stars put aside their feud for a winning jersey swap at the FIFA World Cup 2026 match with Casamigos on July 5. May be an image of one or more people and text that says 'dear global citizens dear world leaders'.","score":0.8747745,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.fifa.com/en/tournaments/mens/worldcup/canadamexicousa2026/articles/madonna-shakira-bts-co-headline-historic-final-halftime-show","title":"Final Halftime Show | FIFA World Cup 2026 | Madonna ...","content":"Football, music and social impact will come together in the FIFA World Cup 2026™ Final Halftime Show on Sunday, 19 July at New York New Jersey Stadium. *   **First-ever halftime performance at a FIFA World Cup™ final to be curated by Chris Martin of Coldplay**. FIFA and Global Citizen today announced that Madonna,Shakira and BTS will co-headline the historic FIFA World Cup 2026™ Final Halftime Show, taking place on Sunday, 19 July at New York New Jersey Stadium. The FIFA World Cup 2026™ Final Halftime Show will support theFIFA Global Citizen Education Fund, an initiative aiming to raise USD 100 million to expand access to quality education and football opportunities for children worldwide. \"As the world comes together for the biggest match in football on 19 July 2026 in New York New Jersey, this historic show will also shine a light on a greater purpose by supporting the FIFA Global Citizen Education Fund and our shared mission to expand access to quality education and football opportunities for children worldwide.","score":0.8742601,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":2.93,"request_id":"445de1f6-894e-44d9-a566-5b55c31363c9"}
